records.question: Which mountains named Taska n’Zat exactly 3912.0 meters high and with prominence at most 460.0 have photos named life in RBG taken using a Sigma 19mm f2.8 EX DN lens with focal length 19.0 and max aperture at least 2.8?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT mountain.id FROM mountain
JOIN photos ON mountain.id = photos.mountain_id
JOIN camera_lens ON photos.camera_lens_id = camera_lens.id
WHERE camera_lens.max_aperture >= 2.8 AND camera_lens.name = 'Sigma 19mm f2.8 EX DN' AND camera_lens.focal_length_mm = 19.0 AND mountain.height = 3912.0 AND mountain.name = 'Taska n’Zat' AND mountain.prominence <= 460.0 AND photos.name = 'life' AND photos.color = 'RBG'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT m.id
FROM mountain m
JOIN photos p ON m.id = p.mountain_id
JOIN camera_lens cl ON p.camera_lens_id = cl.id
WHERE m.name = 'Taska n''Zat'
AND m.Height = 3912.0
AND m.Prominence <= 460.0
AND p.name = 'life in RBG'
AND cl.name = 'Sigma 19mm f2.8 EX DN'
AND cl.focal_length_mm = 19.0
AND cl.max_aperture >= 2.8

records.question: Which mountains in the Guna Massif have a height of exactly 4120.0?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT mountain.id FROM mountain
WHERE mountain.height = 4120.0 AND mountain.range = 'Guna Massif'
records.pred_sql: SELECT id FROM mountain WHERE Range = 'Guna Massif' AND Height = 4120.0

records.question: Which mountains in the Kollo Massif have a prominence of at most 350.0 and have photos named rabbits?

JOIN photos ON mountain.id = photos.mountain_id
JOIN camera_lens ON photos.camera_lens_id = camera_lens.id
WHERE mountain.range = 'Kollo Massif' AND mountain.prominence <= 350.0 AND photos.name = 'rabbits'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT m.id
FROM mountain m
JOIN photos p ON m.id = p.mountain_id
WHERE m.Range = 'Kollo Massif' 
  AND m.Prominence <= 350.0 
  AND p.name = 'rabbits'

records.question: Which mountains named Ouanoukrim in Morocco’s Toubkal Atlas have a height of 4088.0, a prominence of at least 420.0, and photos showing grass in RBG color?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT mountain.id FROM mountain
JOIN photos ON mountain.id = photos.mountain_id
WHERE mountain.range = 'Toubkal Atlas' AND photos.name = 'grass' AND mountain.name = 'Ouanoukrim' AND mountain.country = 'Morocco' AND mountain.prominence >= 420.0 AND photos.color = 'RBG' AND mountain.height = 4088.0
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT m.id
FROM mountain m
JOIN photos p ON m.id = p.mountain_id
WHERE m.name = 'Ouanoukrim'
AND m.Country = 'Morocco'
AND m.Range = 'Toubkal Atlas'
AND m.Height = 4088.0
AND m.Prominence >= 420.0
AND p.name LIKE '%grass%'
AND p.color = 'RBG'
